# SRTextInputSession.SessionType.thirdPartyKeyboard

**Case**

Indicates that the session contains text from a third-party keyboard.

## Declaration

```swift
case thirdPartyKeyboard
```

## Sources

- **SRTextInputSession.SessionType.dictation**: Indicates that the session contains spoken text.
- **SRTextInputSession.SessionType.keyboard**: Indicates that the session contains text from keyboard input.
- **SRTextInputSession.SessionType.pencil**: Indicates that the session contains text drawn with Apple Pencil.

items.description: Indicates that the session contains spoken text.

items.description: Indicates that the session contains text from keyboard input.
